violations.description: Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Condensation from cooling unit drains into a bucket in the walk in cooler. Walk in cooler is used to store charcuterie items.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles in the kitchen area in need of repair.
